questions.question: Describe the difference between RGB and CMYK color models. Which one is suitable for digital displays and which one is suitable for printing?
questions.hint: RGB model is used for digital displays whereas CMYK model is used for printing

questions.question: What is the purpose of the maximum value in a pseudocolor image? How does it affect the image quality?
questions.hint: The maximum value represents the range of colors available in the pseudocolor image. A higher maximum value provides better image quality.

questions.question: Explain the concept of additive and subtractive color mixing in the context of color image processing. Provide examples of each.
questions.hint: Additive color mixing is used in digital displays (RGB) whereas subtractive color mixing is used in printing (CMYK).
